import subprocess, re
from pathlib import Path

def oligotm_tm_arg(seq):
    p = subprocess.run(['oligotm','-tp','1','-sc','1','-mv','50','-dv','2','-n','0.8','-d','500', seq], stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.PIPE)

    m = re.search(r'[-+]?\d*\.?\d+(?:[eE][-+]?\d+)?', text)
